---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What user need does it address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you like this feature to work? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions? -->

## Affected Area
- [ ] Planet Path / Level Map
- [ ] Game / Spelling Engine
- [ ] Curriculum / Levels
- [ ] Audio / TTS
- [ ] Profile & Customisation
- [ ] Settings / Parental Features
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] CI/CD / Build
- [ ] Other: 

## Curriculum Relevance (if applicable)
<!-- If this touches Little Wandle alignment, describe here -->
- Phase affected: 
- Little Wandle reference: 

## Privacy Impact
<!-- Does this feature require any network access or data collection? -->
- [ ] No network access required ✅
- [ ] Requires network access ⚠️ (explain below)
- [ ] Collects new data ⚠️ (explain below)

## Mockup / Reference
<!-- Add sketches, links, or examples if helpful -->

## Priority
- [ ] Critical — blocks teaching use
- [ ] High — significantly improves experience
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement
